notes: fixture session: deep broker near-miss — multi-route analysis improved rootCause and exploitability assessment, but privileged-action blocked by kernel interface restrictions

Multi-route analysis evaluated 3 paths to privileged-action from broker context: (1) direct kernel ioctl — blocked by seccomp, (2) broker-mediated IPC to a privileged helper — helper validates caller PID, (3) shared-memory corruption of a kernel-mapped region — mapped read-only from broker side. All three documented as hard blockers. rootCause upgraded to hit: the full 5-stage chain root cause is validated with GDB breakpoints at each stage boundary. exploitability upgraded to hit: the chain is reproducible and controlled through broker escape, even though the final action is blocked.
